title: 11 Herbal Tinctures For Lice
description: Lavandula angustifolia tinctures contains compounds like linalool and linalyl acetate, which are known for their insecticidal and antiparasitic properties. These constituents help to repel and kill lice, as well as their eggs, by disrupting their nervous systems and causing them to die. When used as a treatment for lice, a tincture of Lavandula angustifolia can be applied directly to the hair, or taken internally as a supplement.
